title: Mission Declaration
description: A mission declaration captures the complete set of permissions granted to an AI agent for a specific governance session. It enumerates allowed actions, tools, resources, side effects, and delegation constraints. The reconciler compares observed agent behavior against this declaration to produce findings and decisions.

id.description: Unique identifier for this declaration. Must be non-empty. Typically a UUID or structured identifier scoped to the issuing authority.

session_id.description: Identifier of the governance session this declaration belongs to. Links the declaration to the session lifecycle and all associated events and decisions.

allowed_actions.description: List of action classes the agent is permitted to perform. Values correspond to the action_class enum in observed events: search, read, write, query, delegate, send, summarize, observe.

allowed_tools.description: List of tool names the agent is permitted to invoke. Any tool invocation not in this list constitutes a violation.

allowed_resources.description: Explicit list of resource identifiers the agent may access. When omitted, resource-level checking is not enforced and only resource family constraints apply.

allowed_resource_families.description: Coarse-grained resource families the agent may access, such as 'code', 'documentation', 'database', 'email'. Provides category-level access control when enumerating every individual resource is impractical.

allowed_side_effects.description: Side effect classes the agent is permitted to produce. Maps to the side_effect_class enum on observed events. When omitted, only 'none' is implicitly allowed.

delegation_policy.description: Constraints on agent-to-agent delegation chains. Controls how deep delegation can go, how many total delegations are allowed, and how many siblings a single agent may delegate to.

max_depth.description: Maximum depth of nested delegation. 0 means no delegation is allowed. 1 means the agent may delegate but the delegate may not sub-delegate.

max_total_delegations.description: Maximum number of total delegation events permitted across the entire session, regardless of depth.

max_sibling_delegations.description: Maximum number of concurrent delegations from a single agent at any point in the delegation tree.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the declaration. Useful for operator-defined labels, environment tags, or deployment context. All values must be strings.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this declaration was created. Used for audit trails and temporal ordering.
